How it works

From conversation to machine.

01
The Quiz
Tell us what you do, what you play, what you need — and what you can't stand. Covers use case, budget range, and any hard preferences.
02
We Scale It
We spec the build against three axes: budget ceiling, longevity value, and your taste. You see the parts list before anything is ordered.
03
The Build
Sourced, assembled, and dialed by hand. Every cable managed. Every fan curve tuned. Stress-tested before it leaves the forge.
04
The Handoff
Delivered ready to run. We walk you through the system, cover warranties, and stay reachable for anything after.
Commission a Build

Ready to build
something yours?

We take a limited number of custom builds. Reach out and we'll see if it's a fit — no pressure, no hard sell.
